reasoningTrace: Market implies 5.4% but model estimates 33.6%, so the entry odds of 186.0 overcompensate relative to fair value (fair price ~2.98). Expected value is strongly positive: 0.336 stake-weighted payoff at 186.0 dwarfs the implied breakeven. The edge is unusually large, suggesting either genuine mispricing or model overconfidence on a deep longshot, so I avoid increasing into a potentially fragile estimate. Holding captures the existing favorable EV while limiting added risk on an extreme outlier line.
